judgment.summary: Fast-growing software company with strong free cash flow but currently unprofitable on a GAAP basis.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat consensus by 31.0%; next earnings date is 2026-04-30.
positives: Revenue growth 31.7% YoY — strong top-line expansion.
Free cash flow $1.44B TTM — company generates significant cash.
Forward P/E 13.23x — reasonable for a growth stock.
PEG ratio 0.66 — suggests stock is undervalued relative to its growth rate.
negatives: Operating margin -2.0% and Profit margin -3.5% — company is not GAAP profitable.
Return on equity -19.3% and Return on assets -1.9% — negative returns on capital.
Current ratio 0.70 and Quick ratio 0.61 — liquidity concerns.

news.paragraph: There are no recent headlines available for TEAM. The last reported earnings for the quarter ending March 31, 2026, showed an EPS beat of 31.0% versus estimates. The next earnings date is scheduled for April 30, 2026.
